scripts.dev: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --wait postgres && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:landing"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server && npm run lint --workspace=admin
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace=client && npm run lint:fix --workspace=server && npm run lint:fix --workspace=admin
